paper_title: Chronology of Western Alpine Thrust Propagation

methods.description: This method involves analyzing sedimentological and stratigraphical data from Miocene molasse deposits to identify depositional sequences and facies associations.

steps.description: Sedimentological and stratigraphical analyses were conducted from 35 well-outcropping sections of the Miocene molasse deposits.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct sedimentological and stratigraphical analyses on Miocene molasse deposits

steps.description: Sedimentary successions up to 1050 m thick were logged at the decimeter to meter scale resolution in the field.
steps.searchable_summary: log sedimentary successions at decimeter to meter scale

steps.description: Using combined analyses of textural characteristics, clastic and biogenic components, bed thickness, bed organization and geometry, sedimentary structures, and paleocurrent measurements, 25 facies grouped into 11 facies associations were defined.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze sedimentary data to define facies and facies associations

steps.description: Depositional sequences were identified based on facies association evolution and the main stratigraphical surfaces.
steps.searchable_summary: identify depositional sequences using facies association evolution

methods.description: This method uses biostratigraphical data from calcareous nannofossils, dinoflagellate cysts, and foraminifera to date depositional sequences.

steps.description: Biostratigraphical dating was conducted on field and well-log samples using calcareous nannofossils, dinoflagellate cysts, and foraminifera.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct biostratigraphical dating using calcareous nannofossils, dinoflagellate cysts, and foraminifera

steps.description: Calibrate biostratigraphical data using established biozonations and chronostratigraphic charts.
steps.searchable_summary: calibrate biostratigraphical data using biozonations and chronostratigraphic charts

methods.description: This method involves using strontium isotope ratios from marine carbonate skeletons to date samples and derive corresponding ages.

steps.description: Strontium isotope dating was performed on samples collected in the field and well-log samples.
steps.searchable_summary: perform strontium isotope dating on field and well-log samples

steps.description: Measure Sr isotope ratios on marine carbonate skeletons at CRPG.
steps.searchable_summary: measure Sr isotope ratios on marine carbonate skeletons

steps.description: Derive ages from measured 87Sr/86Sr ratios using the LOWESS nonparametric regression curve.
steps.searchable_summary: derive ages from 87Sr/86Sr ratios using LOWESS regression

methods.description: This method involves analyzing paleomagnetic data from oriented cores or blocks to understand sedimentary section magnetization.

steps.description: Paleomagnetic results were obtained for 84 samples from oriented cores or blocks.
steps.searchable_summary: obtain paleomagnetic results from oriented cores or blocks

steps.description: Samples were subjected to stepwise alternating field (AF) demagnetization, thermal demagnetization, or a composite procedure.
steps.searchable_summary: perform demagnetization on samples using AF or thermal methods
